# Waypoint Journeys

> Luxury adventure travel to the world's last wild places. Small-group expeditions with a maximum of 5 guests per trip.

## About

Waypoint Journeys is a luxury adventure travel company specializing in hand-crafted expeditions to off-the-beaten-path destinations. Every trip is bespoke, with a maximum group size of 5 guests, ensuring an intimate and personalized experience. We provide 24/7 on-the-ground support, expert local guides, and curated itineraries that go far beyond the guidebook.

- Website: https://wpjourneys.com
- Email: info@wpjourneys.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/waypoint.journeys
- Facebook: https://facebook.com/waypointjourneys

## Expeditions

### Socotra Island, Yemen — April 21–27, 2026
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/socotra/
- Duration: 7 days
- Price: From $2,950 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Dragon's Blood Trees, Hoq Cave, Detwah Lagoon, Shu'ab Beach, UNESCO World Heritage biodiversity
- Description: Explore the "Galápagos of the Indian Ocean" — one of the most isolated and biodiverse places on Earth. Camp under the stars, trek through alien landscapes, and discover species found nowhere else.

### Ghana, Benin & Togo — May 2–9, 2026
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/west-africa-expedition/
- Duration: 8 days
- Price: From $2,950 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Voodoo temples of Ouidah, Cape Coast & Elmina slave castles, Ganvié stilt village, Abomey royal palaces, Accra city tour
- Description: Journey across three West African nations at the crossroads of history. Experience Voodoo ceremonies, walk the halls of slave castles, float through Africa's Venice, and explore vibrant coastal capitals.

### Mongolia — July 4–21, 2026
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/mongolia-expedition/
- Duration: 11 to 17 nights (flexible itinerary)
- Price: From $4,950 per person (11 nights) / $5,950 (14 nights) / $7,450 (17 nights)
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Naadam Festival, Golden Eagle Hunters in Olgii, Gobi Desert (Flaming Cliffs, Khongor Sand Dunes), Terelj National Park, Karakorum ruins, nomadic ger camps
- Description: Cross the Mongolian steppe from the Altai Mountains to the Gobi Desert. Experience the legendary Naadam Festival, ride with Kazakh eagle hunters, sleep in nomadic ger camps, and discover ancient empires.

### Pakistan Karakoram — October 15–27, 2026
- URL: https://wpjourneys.com/pakistan-expedition/
- Duration: 13 days
- Price: From $3,695 per person
- Group size: Max 5 guests
- Highlights: Karakoram Highway, Hunza Valley autumn foliage, Lahore's Mughal heritage, Skardu, Attabad Lake, Passu Cones, Wagah Border ceremony
- Description: Travel the Karakoram Highway through the most dramatic mountain landscapes on Earth. From Lahore's Mughal splendour to Hunza Valley's golden autumn, this expedition reveals Pakistan's extraordinary beauty and hospitality.

## Key Facts

- Maximum 5 guests per expedition
- Bespoke, hand-crafted itineraries
- 24/7 on-the-ground support
- Expert local guides
- Price range: $2,950–$7,450 per person
- Destinations: Socotra (Yemen), Mongolia, Pakistan, Ghana, Benin, Togo
- All trips include accommodation, internal transport, guided activities, and most meals
